message:
fix(engine): align test assertions with updated runtime semantics

- catalog_hash changed from a string to an array; update law_mining_cli
  assertions from is_string() to is_array()
- Lowering gap and parser gap inventories now report 0 fail-closed and
  0 open-placeholder sites (all sites promoted to ready status); update
  expected counts in both test files
- Minor adjustment to regression_test_hint assertion in lowering gap tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
